subject: [AAI] Service monitor for scraping prometheus metrics
commit_message:
[AAI] Service monitor for scraping prometheus metrics

Changes are done for aai resources graphadmin and traversal
Session affinity for aai resources traversal and aai haproxy

Issue-ID: AAI-3599
Signed-off-by: leila <leila.nishimwe@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ib3853c45051ca8e9c025bd0d6e700a08a54cb1a9

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure AKS 4: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 695520430), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6054/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6054/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 101 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Add service monitor for scraping prometheus metrics in aai-resources aai-graphadmin and aai-traversal ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6054/ )
